sections.changelog:
1.5.4

  • Fixed One Click Demo Import export/import coverage.
  • Export Current Setup now includes categories and posts, not only widgets/menus/customizer/homepage.
  • Import now processes categories and posts before menus so taxonomy menu items are restored correctly.
  • Legacy default-import.json files without posts/categories now fall back to bundled demo content when those options are selected.
  • Menu import now replaces existing items in the target menu instead of silently skipping them.
